differential_diagnoses: Systemic onset juvenile idiopathic arthritis (or Adult-onset Still's disease)
next_steps: Thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, total T3)
Thyroid uptake and scan (if TSH is suppressed)
Erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) and CRP monitoring
Blood cultures for Bartonella and serologic testing
Excisional lymph node biopsy if neck pain persists and lymphadenopathy is identified or suggested by imaging
Consider PET/CT scan if systemic symptoms persist without a clear focus
